dataPolicy: Synthetic article and request examples only.
No production inbox data, real users, credentials, wallet values, or secrets.
No live network references are required to run tests.

articles.title: Reset a team member password
articles.summary: Steps for password reset, sign-in recovery, and login verification.
articles.body: Use the account recovery form, confirm the member identity, and send the password reset link. If multi-factor authentication is enabled, ask the member to verify the new session.
relatedQuestions: How do I reset my password?
A team member cannot sign in.

articles.title: Download invoices and receipts
articles.summary: Where billing admins can find invoices, receipts, and payment history.
articles.body: Open billing settings, choose the invoices tab, then download the monthly invoice or receipt. Only billing admins can access invoice history.
relatedQuestions: Where can I download an invoice?
How do I find a receipt?

articles.title: Recover two-factor authentication access
articles.summary: Recovery process when a team member loses an authenticator device.
articles.body: Verify identity with an admin, use backup codes when available, and reset the two-factor authentication requirement only after approval.
relatedQuestions: What if I lost my authenticator?

articles.title: Track delivery status for shipped items
articles.summary: How support teams explain shipment tracking, delivery delays, and carrier updates.
articles.body: Use the shipment page to confirm carrier status, tracking number, and delivery estimate. For delayed packages, open a delivery investigation.

articles.title: Customer data retention policy
articles.summary: Explains retention windows, deletion requests, and policy review boundaries.
articles.body: Support can explain standard retention windows and route deletion requests to the policy review queue. Do not promise deletion before policy review is complete.
relatedQuestions: How long do you retain data?

articles.title: Legacy sign-in troubleshooting
articles.summary: Archived article for the old login system.
articles.body: This article is archived and should not be suggested for current login recovery workflows.
relatedQuestions: How did legacy sign in work?

input.query: A team member forgot their password and cannot sign in
Customer needs a receipt and invoice for payment history
User lost phone with authenticator and needs 2fa backup codes
